coaching.chooseType: Choose the type of support to start your session.

coaching.deleteWarning: This action will also delete the messages in this session. It cannot be undone.
coaching.hint: Tip: start quickly with the Smart AI coach for immediate support.

coaching.emptyChatDescriptionEmpty: Select a support type on the left, then start a session.
suggestedPrompts: I feel stressed before my exams.
coaching.statusNoCoach: Choose an available coach or switch to the Smart AI coach.

topbar.title: My progress
topbar.description: Track your progress based on exercises assigned by your coach and validated after feedback.

checkin.progressHint: The bar advances when your coach validates an exercise with feedback.
checkin.awaitingFeedbackText: Your exercise has been submitted. Progress will increase after coach validation.
checkin.empty: No exercise has been assigned to you yet. You will receive a notification when your coach assigns you a personalised exercise.

form.label: My progress

register.alreadyConfirmed: Your attendance has already been confirmed.

motivation.errorReaction: Unable to react at the moment.

psyOrientation.pageDescription: View your coach's recommendation and choose your response.
psyOrientation.infoText: If you accept, you will be redirected to the appointment booking page with the psychologist. This request will be treated as urgent.
psyOrientation.acceptedInfo: Orientation accepted. You can now choose an appointment.
psyOrientation.alreadyAnswered: Your response has already been recorded.

topbar.title: Appointments
topbar.description: Request personalised support with the psychologist and track your appointments.

appointments.linkBeforeSession: The link will be sent to you by email 10 min before the session.
appointments.rejectionHelp: Please choose another available appointment from the calendar.
appointments.emptyText: Your appointment requests will appear here.
appointments.noNextSession: No session has been confirmed yet.
appointments.infoText: The displayed slots come directly from the psychologist's schedule. Once the request is sent, it stays pending until confirmed.

form.dayMessageFull: All slots for this day are already taken.
form.dayMessageWeekend: The psychologist does not work on weekends.
form.dayMessageClosed: The psychologist is not available on this day.
form.dayMessageDefault: No time slots available for this date.
form.hiddenNote: Past or already booked slots are not shown.
form.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly explain why you would like to meet with the psychologist.
form.errorSubmitValidation: Please choose an available slot and provide a reason for your request.
form.success: Request sent. The psychologist will be able to confirm it from their space.

page.title: Notifications
page.description: View new actions and open the associated page directly.

topbar.title: My Profile
topbar.description: View your general information and your analysis report.

profile.reportEmpty: No report is available yet. Once your analysis is ready, the PDF report will appear here.
profile.reportSideText: Your analysis report is centralised in this space and can be viewed or exported as PDF.

topbar.title: My dreams
topbar.description: Tell your dreams, track their video generation and relive each scene in an elegant and personal space.

topbar.title: My interview report
topbar.description: Find your interview summary, key points identified and your PDF report.

analyses.reportEmpty: Your report will appear here automatically after your unique interview is complete.
analyses.aboutDescription: This report is generated from your unique interview. It serves as a personal summary and can be accessed at any time from this space.

pending.label: Profile being evaluated
pending.description: Big Five scores are not yet sufficient to calculate a reliable index.

balanced.label: Overall balanced profile
balanced.description: Traits indicate a good level of personal resources and an encouraging overall stability.

toSupport.label: Profile to support
toSupport.description: The profile shows useful strengths, with some areas to support to improve daily comfort.

sensitive.label: Sensitive profile
sensitive.description: The profile indicates several fragile areas that deserve careful and progressive support.

dreams.heroTitle: Tell your dream, then validate its summary.
dreams.heroDescription: Simply describe what you remember. The app prepares a summary and an analysis, then starts the video after your validation.
dreams.textareaPlaceholder: Example: I was in an unknown house, looking for someone and feeling afraid…
dreams.submitSuccess: Dream sent. The video will appear here once the workflow finishes.
dreams.submitErrorEmpty: Describe your dream before starting the generation.
dreams.submitErrorServer: Unable to send this dream right now.
dreams.submitErrorFetch: A network error occurred while sending.
dreams.deleteSuccess: The dream has been removed from your journal.
dreams.deleteErrorFetch: A network error occurred while deleting.
dreams.validateSuccess: Summary validated. Video generation will begin.
dreams.validateErrorFetch: A network error occurred during validation.
dreams.regenerateSuccess: A new analysis and a new summary are being generated.
dreams.regenerateErrorFetch: A network error occurred during regeneration.
dreams.videoPlaceholder: The video will appear here after the summary is validated.
dreams.journalCount: {count, plural, one {# dream saved} other {# dreams saved}}
dreams.noResults: No dream matches your search right now.

statusDescription.ready: The video and summary are available.
statusDescription.failed: Generation failed. You can start a new dream.
statusDescription.generating: The video workflow is being processed.
statusDescription.waitingValidation: The summary is waiting for your validation before video generation.
statusDescription.pending: The dream is queued before generation.

dreams.analysisFailedError: The analysis could not be generated for this dream. You can start another one whenever you want.
dreams.analysisNotAvailable: The analysis is not yet available for this dream.
dreams.analysisEmpty: No analysis available at the moment.

hero.title: contact our team
hero.description: A question, bug, or partnership request? Our team replies personally within 24h.

form.emailHint: We will reply to this address
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your request with as much detail as possible…
form.privacy: Your message is confidential. Your data is only used to reply and is never shared with third parties.
form.submitError: Unable to send the message. Please try again.
form.successLine1: Thanks! Our team will reply to

infos.teamText: Our team reads each message personally

faqItems.a: Via the form, email, or phone. We reply quickly.
Yes, your data is end-to-end encrypted and never resold.

faqItems.q: Technical issue: what should I do?
faqItems.a: Write to contact@mindbloom.tn and we will reply quickly.

faqItems.q: How can I contact a coach or psychologist?
faqItems.a: The platform automatically routes you to the right support.
We usually reply within 24 business hours.

hero.subtitle: Intelligent support with AI.
hero.intro: An innovative platform dedicated to student well-being, connecting students with certified professionals while leveraging AI to provide personalized support.

process.title: How does it work?
process.description: Three steps are enough to access your personalized space.

steps.title: Choose your profile
steps.description: Student, psychologist or coach - select your role to access your personalized space.

steps.title: Access via magic link
steps.description: Enter your email and receive a secure link valid for 10 minutes. No password required.

steps.title: Track your progress
steps.description: Review your progress and receive tailored advice to move forward each week.

stress.title: University life: a challenge for student well-being
stress.description: Students face increasing pressure that affects their results. Tailored support and personality analysis change everything, for students and universities alike.
stress.emptyLabel: Hover over a bar to display details for each source of stress.

hero.subtitle: A support platform built for students
hero.paragraph: Because success starts with feeling well. Our platform supports you every day: a safe space to speak freely, understand your emotions, and move forward with the human and AI support you need.
hero.videoAria: Illustrated video of the April 28 dream
hero.journalDesc: AI-generated illustrated video · Summary of your night

cards.title: Founders & specialists
cards.description: Meet the project founders and our team of specialists.

cards.title: Our specialist team
cards.description: Meet our experts dedicated to student well-being.

cards.title: A strong ethics at MindBloom's core
Vision 2028
cards.description: Our roadmap for lasting, measurable impact.

ethics.title: A strong ethics at the core of

values.title: Privacy
values.description: All your personal data, conversations and reports stay strictly private. No sharing with third parties, ever.

values.title: Security
values.description: The platform is protected by advanced protocols: magic link, encryption and secure authentication.

values.title: Kindness
values.description: Every feature is designed with empathy and respect for students, in a friendly, judgment-free space.

values.title: Responsibility
values.description: We deliver reliable information validated by certified professionals, in a serious framework.

vision.title: Our vision for 2028
vision.description: A roadmap for lasting impact and stronger support for students across Tunisia.

steps.description: Initial deployment with pilot students and quantitative feedback.
Expand the service to multiple campuses and improve support pathways.
A stable ecosystem to support students over the long term.

objectives.description: Recruit experts in coaching, psychology and technology for full support.
Track student well-being with concrete metrics and continuous improvement.
Provide simple, safe and tailored support for every student, wherever they are.

team.supervisorDescription: MindBloom project supervisor - methodological guidance and scientific validation of the solution.
team.specialistsDescription: Each student can choose the specialist best suited to their needs for personalized, human, reassuring support.

founders.description: Co-developer of the solution and co-creator of the MindBloom concept.
Co-developer of the solution and co-creator of the MindBloom concept.

specialists.title: Educational support coach
specialists.description: Supports students in organizing their studies, managing stress, and improving their academic journey.

specialists.title: Personal development coach
specialists.description: Supports students with motivation, self-confidence, and orientation choices.

specialists.title: Academic success coach
specialists.description: Helps improve productivity, time management, and learning methods.

specialists.title: Emotional regulation coach
specialists.description: Supports students in emotional regulation, interpersonal communication, and preventing emotional overload.

specialists.title: Compassionate communication coach
specialists.description: Guides students in public speaking, non-violent communication, and conflict management in university settings.

specialists.title: University clinical psychologist
specialists.description: Provides professional psychological support for anxiety disorders, student distress, and vulnerability situations.
